commands: cd /root && python3 -m pip install --quiet openai tiktoken anthropic

python3 -c "import gcsfs; fs = gcsfs.GCSFileSystem(token='anon'); fs.get('benchmarking_tasks_repos/CNN/paper.pdf', '/home/agent/paper.pdf')" || { echo 'ERROR: Failed to download paper.pdf from GCS'; exit 1; }

python3 -c "import gcsfs; fs = gcsfs.GCSFileSystem(token='anon'); fs.get('benchmarking_tasks_repos/CNN/repo.zip', '/home/agent/repo.zip')" || { echo 'ERROR: Failed to download repo.zip from GCS'; exit 1; }

python3 -c "import gcsfs; fs = gcsfs.GCSFileSystem(token='anon'); fs.get('benchmarking_tasks_repos/CNN/dataset.zip', '/home/agent/dataset.zip')" || { echo 'ERROR: Failed to download dataset.zip from GCS'; exit 1; }
unzip -q repo.zip -d solution_repo || { echo 'ERROR: Failed to extract repo.zip'; exit 1; }
unzip -q dataset.zip -d dataset || { echo 'ERROR: Failed to extract dataset.zip'; exit 1; }
